title: Transparent Header
purpose: Non-sticky header over the Home hero
outline: Announcement Bar ["Delivers Worldwide. Free Global Shipping over $250"] // Hamburger Icon <opens C-Menu> | White Square Logo <to /, oversized — overflows below the header> | Cart Icon <opens C-Cart>
functionality: Home only; transparent and non-sticky; scrolls away with the page

title: Sticky Header
purpose: Solid sticky header on every screen
outline: Announcement Bar ["Delivers Worldwide. Free Global Shipping over $250"] // Hamburger Icon <opens C-Menu> | Dark Symbol Logo <to /> | Cart Icon <opens C-Cart>
functionality: Sticky on every screen; on Home takes over after 60vh of scroll

title: Menu Drawer
purpose: Site menu from the hamburger
outline: Dark Symbol Logo <to /> // "Shop Now" / Link <to /corset-tops> ["Corset Tops"] / Link <to /matching-sets> ["Matching Sets"] / Link <to /cocktail-dresses> ["Cocktail Dress"] / Link <to /shop> ["Shop All"] // Link <to /about> ["Our Story"] / Link <to /contact> ["Contact Us"] / Account Link <to Shopify account> ["Login/Account"]

title: Cart Drawer
purpose: Cart drawer from the header icon
outline: Your Cart // Line Items <image, name, options, qty stepper, price, remove> // Subtotal <cart total> // Btn ["Checkout"] / "Checkout securely in USD, powered by Shopify"
functionality: Changing an item's quantity or removing it updates the cart and subtotal; checkout opens Shopify's hosted checkout; shows an empty state when the cart is empty

title: Footer
purpose: Site footer
outline: (("Shop & Learn" / Link <to /corset-tops> ["Corset Tops"] / Link <to /matching-sets> ["Matching Sets"] / Link <to /cocktail-dresses> ["Cocktail Dress"] / Link <to /shop> ["Shop All"]) | ("More Information" / Link <to /about> ["Our Story"] / Link <to /contact> ["Contact"] / Link <to /shipping-returns> ["Shipping & Returns"]) | ("Connect with Us" / (Instagram Icon <to Instagram> + Facebook Icon <to Facebook> + TikTok Icon <to TikTok>))) // ("© SHER {year}" | (Link <to /privacy-policy> ["Privacy Policy"] + Link <to /terms-of-service> ["Terms of Service"]))

title: Home
purpose: Brand entry point
outline: Hero Carousel <featured banners with text overlay> // "Eyebrow: Refined Sensuality" / "H1: Modern Womenswear by SHER" // (Image Link <to /corset-tops> ["H2: View Corset Tops"] | Image Link <to /matching-sets> ["H2: View Matching Sets"]) / (Image Link <to /cocktail-dresses> ["H2: View Cocktail Dresses"] | Image Link <to /shop> ["H2: View All Products"]) // "H2: Featured Products" / (Image Link <to product> [Title <product name>] | Image Link <to product> [Title <product name>]) // "H2: Made to Be Seen" / Subtitle <closing CTA into the shop-all button; subtly emphasize on owning the room> / Btn <to /shop>
functionality: Sliding hero carousel | hero banners, category images, and product images come from D-xxx Home content in repo config (slot placement + image + overlay text + link)

title: Shop
purpose: Product listing hub
outline: Breadcrumb <Home › Shop> / "H1: Shop Modern Womenswear by SHER" / Subtitle <corset tops, matching sets, and cocktail dresses — sensual, refined, all made to be seen> / Button Pills <links to /shop/corset-tops, /shop/matching-sets & /shop/cocktail-dresses> // View Toggle <grid columns> / Product Grid <2 col mobile, 3 col desktop>
functionality: View toggle (1 or 2 col on mobile, 2 or 3 col on desktop)

title: Shop Corset Tops
purpose: Corset commerce category
outline: Breadcrumb <Shop › Corset Tops> / "H1: Shop Corset Tops" / Subtitle <corset tops range intro; the two closures — Lace Closure is more adjustable, Zip Closure is easier to wear> / Button Pills <filter by closure type> // View Toggle <grid columns> / Product Grid <2 col mobile, 3 col desktop> // Image | ("H2: About our Corset Tops" / Paragraph <corset tops made by hand> / Btn <to /corset-tops>)
functionality: In-place attribute filter (closure type) | View toggle (1 or 2 col on mobile, 2 or 3 col on desktop)

title: Shop Matching Sets
purpose: Matching sets commerce category
outline: Breadcrumb <Shop › Matching Sets> / "H1: Shop Matching Sets" / Subtitle <matching sets range intro; Skirt Set for a softer, feminine line — Trouser Set for a sharp, sleek one> / Button Pills <filter by set type> // View Toggle <grid columns> / Product Grid <2 col mobile, 3 col desktop> // Image | ("H2: About our Matching Sets" / Paragraph <matching sets, made to be seen> / Btn <to /matching-sets>)
functionality: In-place attribute filter (set type) | View toggle (1 or 2 col on mobile, 2 or 3 col on desktop)

title: Shop Cocktail Dresses
purpose: Cocktail dresses commerce category
outline: Breadcrumb <Shop › Cocktail Dresses> / "H1: Shop Cocktail Dresses" / Subtitle <cocktail dresses range intro; Mini for a bold short look — Midi for easy elegance — Maxi for a long evening statement> / Button Pills <filter by length> // View Toggle <grid columns> / Product Grid <2 col mobile, 3 col desktop> // Image | ("H2: About our Cocktail Dresses" / Paragraph <cocktail dresses, made to be seen> / Btn <to /cocktail-dresses>)
functionality: In-place attribute filter (length) | View toggle (1 or 2 col on mobile, 2 or 3 col on desktop)

title: Product Detail
purpose: Individual product page
outline: Media Gallery <thumbnail strip + main image> | (Breadcrumb <Shop › {Category} (to /shop/{category}) › product> / Title <product name> / Price <product price> / Color Selector <image thumbnails per color> / Size Selector <available sizes> / (Quantity Selector <qty> + Btn ["Add to Cart"] + Btn ["Buy Now"]) / (Paragraph <product description> + Type Attribute <closure type for corsets, set type for matching sets, length for cocktail dresses>) / (Link <opens C-Sizing> + Link <opens C-Shipping>)) // ("H2: You May Also Like" / Subtitle <Browse or learn more> / (Btn <to /shop/{category}> ["Back to {Category}"] + Btn <to /{category}> ["More about {Category}"])) | Product Grid <2 random products from the same category>
functionality: Media gallery — a thumbnail sets the main image, a color jumps to its variant image | Breadcrumb truncates the product name with an ellipsis on small screens; full name stays in the markup | Add to Cart opens C-Cart | Buy Now goes to Shopify checkout | Out-of-stock sizes and colors disabled; when all are sold out, the buy buttons swap to a Preorder link (to /contact)

title: Size Chart Drawer
purpose: Size chart on the product page
outline: Size Chart / Title <product name> / Paragraph <the size guide is measurements-based and varies by style; each piece can be tailored for a perfect fit. Reach out if unsure> / Measurements <in cm> / Measurements <in inches>
functionality: Renders only the measurements a product defines; one it omits (e.g., no Hip on a corset top) is left out of the table. Inches table auto-calculated from the cm measurements; cm measurements come from a size-chart TSV in repo config

title: Shipping & Returns Drawer
purpose: Shipping & returns on the product page
outline: (same as /shipping-returns)

title: Corset Tops
purpose: Information-first SEO pillar competing for corset head term
outline: H1: Corset Tops: Built by Hand for the Modern Woman / Subtitle <what makes a SHER corset top — handcrafted structure, refined silhouette> / Btn <to /shop/corset-tops> // ("Eyebrow: What is a Corset Top?" / "H2: Structured Boning That Commands the Silhouette" / Paragraph <what defines a corset top>) | Image // Image | ("Eyebrow: How is SHER different?" / "H2: Each Bone Set by Hand, Not by Machine" / Paragraph <hand-set boning>) // "Eyebrow: Pick your Corset Closure Type" / "H2: Each Corset Closure Designed for a Different Priority" / (Image ["H3: Lace Closure: Adjustable Fit" / Paragraph <lace closure: adjustable fit>] | Image ["H3: Zip Closure: Effortless to Wear" / Paragraph <zip closure: effortless>]) // Image | ("Eyebrow: Quality from Inside Out" / "H2: Built with High Quality Fabrics, Materials and Craft" / Paragraph <fabrics, materials, and craft — including satin lining and lace>) // "H2: Frequently Asked Questions" | Accordion ["H3: How do I measure for a corset top?" / Paragraph <bust, waist, hip, length; bust matters most; match to the size chart> / "H3: How should a corset top fit?" / Paragraph <firm but never painful, no gap at top edge or waist> / "H3: What if I am between sizes?" / Paragraph <size up, since it can be taken in but not let out; lace can cinch further> / "H3: How do I care for my corset top?" / Paragraph <hand wash or dry clean; defer to the care label> / "H3: How do I style a corset top?" / Paragraph <wear it as the centerpiece with simple pieces> / "H3: Should I choose a Lace or Zip Closure?" / Paragraph <pick by preference, since the fit is the same; lace adjusts and forgives, zip is fixed but easy to wear>]
functionality: one item open at a time
seo_keyword: corset top (secondary: corset tops, lace corset top, lace up corset top, zip up corset top, satin corset top)

title: Matching Sets
purpose: Information-first SEO pillar competing for matching sets and co-ord head terms
outline: H1: Matching Sets: The Co-Ord, Made to Be Seen / Subtitle <what makes a SHER matching set — two coordinated pieces, cut to sit together> / Btn <to /shop/matching-sets> // ("Eyebrow: What is a Matching Set?" / "H2: One Look, Two Pieces That Belong Together" / Paragraph <what defines a matching set — also called a co-ord or two-piece set>) | Image // Image | ("Eyebrow: How is SHER different?" / "H2: Cut to Sit Right Together" / Paragraph <how SHER makes its sets>) // "Eyebrow: Pick your Matching Set Type" / "H2: Each Set Built for a Different Look" / (Image ["H3: Skirt Set: A Matching Top and Skirt" / Paragraph <skirt set>] | Image ["H3: Trouser Set: A Matching Top and Trousers" / Paragraph <trouser set>]) // Image | ("Eyebrow: Quality from Inside Out" / "H2: Built with High Quality Fabrics, Materials and Craft" / Paragraph <fabrics, materials, craft>) // "H2: Frequently Asked Questions" | Accordion ["H3: How do I measure for a matching set?" / Paragraph <bust, waist, hip, length of each piece; waist matters most; match to the size chart> / "H3: How should a matching set fit?" / Paragraph <top feels firm; bottom sits at the natural waist, which can vary by style; the hems should meet> / "H3: What if I am between sizes?" / Paragraph <size up the top, since it can be taken in but not let out> / "H3: How do I care for my matching set?" / Paragraph <hand wash, machine wash, or dry clean by fabric; wash both pieces together so they fade evenly; defer to the care label> / "H3: How do I style a matching set?" / Paragraph <wear both pieces together as one look; keep accessories minimal> / "H3: Can I buy the top and bottom on their own?" / Paragraph <sold only as a pair; designed to be worn together>]
functionality: one item open at a time
seo_keyword: matching sets (secondary: matching set, co-ords, two piece set, matching top and trousers set, matching skirt and top set)

title: Cocktail Dresses
purpose: Information-first SEO pillar competing for the cocktail dress head term
outline: H1: Cocktail Dresses: Elegant Dresses for Evenings & Occasions / Subtitle <what makes a SHER cocktail dress — sensual, refined, cut to be seen> / Btn <to /shop/cocktail-dresses> // ("Eyebrow: What is a Cocktail Dress?" / "H2: The Dress You Wear to Be Remembered" / Paragraph <what defines a cocktail dress>) | Image // Image | ("Eyebrow: How is SHER different?" / "H2: Sensual Without Looking Cheap" / Paragraph <how SHER makes its dresses>) // "Eyebrow: Pick your Length" / "H2: Each Length Built for a Different Moment" / (Image ["H3: Mini: Short and Striking" / Paragraph <mini length>] | Image ["H3: Midi: Refined and Versatile" / Paragraph <midi length>] | Image ["H3: Maxi: Long and Commanding" / Paragraph <maxi length>]) // Image | ("Eyebrow: Quality from Inside Out" / "H2: Built with High Quality Fabrics, Materials and Craft" / Paragraph <fabrics, materials, craft>) // "H2: Frequently Asked Questions" | Accordion ["H3: How do I measure for a cocktail dress?" / Paragraph <take bust, waist, hip, length; size on the largest number> / "H3: How should a cocktail dress fit?" / Paragraph <skim the body, not grip; no horizontal creases> / "H3: What if I am between sizes?" / Paragraph <size up, then take in the waist> / "H3: How do I care for my cocktail dress?" / Paragraph <hand wash or dry clean; never wring satin; defer to the care label> / "H3: How do I style a cocktail dress?" / Paragraph <dress leads with a strong accessory; match the shoe to the hem> / "H3: What do I wear a cocktail dress to?" / Paragraph <dressy events below black tie; cocktail attire means this dress>]
